payload.text: Reviewer Agent score: plausibility 0.55 · evidence 0.25 · scope 0.55 · duplicate-risk 0.20. Hypothesis that BACE1 trial failures were driven by non-APP substrate effects; predictions are testable but evidence is weak meta-commentary. Concerns: Evidence span is interpretive framing, not data; Conflates trial failure causes (efficacy vs toxicity); No quantitative or substrate-specific support provided.
